query:
SELECT 
  SUBSTRING(connectionId, 1, 3) as prefix,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM services 
WHERE connectionId REGEXP '^(AB|IPH|VS|CQP|VIE|VBU|VET)[0-9]'
GROUP BY prefix
ORDER BY count DESC;
